summary: Markdown notes with AI under your control Discussion | Link
content: Bamboo is a Markdown-first notes app for people who want a simple, portable workspace for ideas, documents, tasks, research, and personal knowledge. It combines a focused editor, collections, wiki links, web clipping, import/export, backups, and cross-device sync across iPhone, iPad, and Mac. AI is optional and controlled by you: connect supported providers, choose your model, and draft, rewrite, summarize, or brainstorm inside your notes.
chineseSummary: 人工智能 Markdown 笔记由你掌控 讨论 |关联
chineseContent: Bamboo 是一款 Markdown 优先的笔记应用程序，适合那些想要一个简单、便携式工作空间来存储想法、文档、任务、研究和个人知识的人。它结合了专注的编辑器、集合、wiki 链接、网页剪辑、导入/导出、备份以及跨 iPhone、iPad 和 Mac 的跨设备同步。 AI 是可选的，由您控制：连接支持的提供商，选择您的模型，并在笔记中起草、重写、总结或集思广益。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
